data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of service selection and time picking without leaving the app. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented, as it only describes the booking process without demonstrating that it occurs entirely within the app. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but there is no direct evidence supporting its implementation, leading to a clear gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that service selection and time picking occurs without leaving the app.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for in-app booking functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that service selection and time picking can be completed without navigating away from the app.
